characters.name: Abominable Snowbot
characters.description: Abominable Snowbot19822002Background informationFirst appearance(s)Winter OlympicsLast appearance(s)Inspector Gadget's Last CaseFeature filmsInspector Gadget's Last CaseTelevision programsInspector Gadget (1983 TV Series)Character informationOccupationN / AAlignmentBadSpeciesRobotGenderMaleRelativesUnknownStatusAliveSourceTheAbominable Snowbotwas a character inInspector Gadget. The Abominable Snowbot was a bulky mechanical monster, resembling a gorilla, with dark blue metal arms and legs, a light blue chest with grey bolts for nipples. His head is dark blue and his lower jaw is pink with upward sticking fangs. In the Last Case movie, he resembles Frankenstein's Monster, but icy white in color with grey metal hands. He wore a white shirt and blue tie under a teal business suit jack, blue trousers and grey and white shoes. He later wore a light purple jumpsuit with black boots.

He wore a white shirt and blue tie under a teal business suit jack, blue trousers and grey and white shoes. He later wore a light purple jumpsuit with black boots.

characters.name: Agent 612
characters.description: Agent 612Background informationFirst appearance(s)Down on the FarmLast appearance(s)Down on the FarmTelevision programsInspector Gadget (1983 TV Series)VoiceGreg DuffellCharacter informationOccupationM.A.D. AgentInstrumentsMouth organAlignmentBadAffiliationsM.A.D.HomeMetro CitySpeciesAmericanGenderMaleSpeciesHumanRelativesUnknownStatusAliveSourceAgent 612is one ofDr. Claw's agents inInspector Gadget. Agent 612 is a stocky man with dusty blonde hair. He wears a red shirt under a pair of tan overalls and brown boots with a black sun hat. Agent 612 was aM.A.D. agentduring the Farm Missile mission. He keept watch outside the General Store near the farm together with another agent disguised as aWooden Indian. His equipment included a mouth organ, which he used to pass away the time, but which could also act as a communication device and an offensive weapon. 612 recognizedInspector Gadgetwhen he arrived at the store, despite the inspector wearing a disguised hat. The agent immediately contacted Dr. Claw, identifying himself as 612 and informing "Black Leader" that Gadget had just passed Checkpoint Number One. He then loaded a dart filled with a sleeping drug into his mouth organ and attempted to blow it at Gadget's behind. However, Gadget accidentally dropped some marbles on the floor, causing 612 to slip and hit himself in the leg with the dart. The sleeping drug promptly took effect. Agent 612 was still asleep when his fellow Agents reported to Dr. Claw. They managed to set him upright during the meeting, but he soon fell flat on his face.

characters.name: Artemus Bradford
characters.description: Artemus BradfordCharacter informationOccupationScientistSpeciesHumanGenderMaleRelativesUnnamed wife (deceased)Brenda Bradford(daughter)StatusDeceasedSourceArtemus Bradfordis a character inInspector Gadget. He wasBrenda's father and a brilliant scientist in Cyborg technology, alongside his daughter. Artemus met his demise whenSanford Scolexkilled him while attacking the lab. Artemus Bradford and his daughter Brenda are designing a lifelike robotic foot as part of the Gadget Program, designed to add android officers to the Riverton Police Department. Sanford Scolex, a tycoon, uses a robotic tank to break into the Bradford laboratory and steals the foot to build an army of androids from its technology, assassinating Artemus in the process.

characters.name: Billy Thaw
characters.description: William ThawBackground informationVoiceAlex DodukCharacter informationFull nameWilliam ThawOther namesBillySpeciesCaucasianGenderMaleSpeciesHumanRelativesGordon Сlaw(grandfather)Maryland Claw(grandmother)Dr. Claw(uncle)ParentsDr. Thaw(father)Unnamed motherStatusAliveSourceWilliam "Billy" Thawis the legitimate son ofDr. Thawand, by extension, the nephew ofDr. Claw. He was sent by his grandmother to stay with his uncle, Dr. Claw to become evil just like all of his relatives while he is on spring break from boarding school. He meets Penny, who is on a mission with Inspector Gadget and the Gadgetinis. Penny quickly develops a crush on him, and he takes her and the rest of the Gadgets to his uncle's house for dinner. When William found out his uncle was evil, he called his grandma to warn her. Of course, his grandma was evil too and didn't understand at all. This caused Claw to blow up his lair and for William and the others to escape safely. However, Claw and MAD Cat escaped as well in Claw's plane. It is never revealed what happened to William at the end, but he probably went back to boarding school or with his grandmother.

characters.name: Blackie
characters.description: BlackieBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Birds of a FeatherLast appearance(s)Birds of a FeatherTelevision programsInspector Gadget (1983 TV Series)VoiceGreg DuffelCharacter informationAlignmentBad, later goodGenderMaleSpeciesRavenSource Blackieis a raven and the former pet of TurkishM.A.D. Agent,Icarus Finch. He was taught to steal, along with his other birds Killer, Breaker, and Fast Eddie. Blackie could also talk, either via having been taught or born with the innate ability to talk, making him an unofficial second-in-command, as he can order the other birds around. Blackie was left behind once Finch was caught, allowing him to be redeemed.

characters.name: Brain (Disney)
characters.description: Brain19992003Background informationFirst appearance(s)Inspector Gadget (film)Last appearance(s)Inspector Gadget 2VoiceDon AdamsJeff BennettCharacter informationPersonalityLoyal, helpful, funnyAlignmentGoodGenderMaleSpeciesDogOwner(s)Inspector GadgetPennyAlliesInspector Gadget,Penny,Gadgetmobile,Brenda Bradford,Sykes,Chief QuimbyEnemiesDr. Claw,Sykes(formerly),Kramer,RoboGadgetLikesHelping Penny and Inspector Gadget on casesDislikesDr. Clawand his evil schemes, seeing Penny sadSource Brainis the dog of Penny and Inspector Gadget. Brain is first seen when he wakes up John Brown from his sleep after dreaming of becoming a police officer. Then he is seen when Penny visits her uncle in the hospital after an accident he had pursuing Sanford Scolex. Brain licks his mouth but Penny tells him not to. Brain is later shown in the Gadgetmobile cruising Riverton with his owners and then taken to the dump after finding out Gadget is there. He goes with Penny to Scolex's (now Dr. Claw) building to find proof her uncle is innocent. While Penny looks for the foot, Brain chases after Dr. Claw, but only manages to pull out his boxers. After Claw is defeated by Gadget and arrested, Brain is seen sitting beside Penny still holding Claw's boxers in his mouth and then goes home with the others, while Claw vows revenge.
